observations.observed_before_fix: build failed because interprocNodeID had no CallOrdinal field; the production graph represented only one call/return pair per CFG AST node

the registered analyzer emitted no protocol diagnostic for consume(mutate(&value)) after validation because the outer call hid the inner mutation; sibling mutation and unresolved-effect calls in the same expression were likewise skipped
conditional validation and validation followed by a later LIFO overwrite were incorrectly safe; an unresolved deferred effect was incorrectly a definite violation instead of blocking inconclusive
evidence: Unresolved: got unsafe, want inconclusive unresolved-target

observations.observed_before_fix: the registered analyzer accepted conditional and overwritten deferred validation as safe and did not surface the unresolved or capture-rebound deferred effects as blocking inconclusive

returned, stored, passed, callback-style, nested, recursive, and cross-package escaping function literals were classified as non-executable when no same-body invocation was visible, so their local casts produced no diagnostics
evidence: cfa_escaping_closure.NestedReturned: missing nested local cast violation
cfa_escaping_closure.RecursiveCallback: missing recursive local cast violation
cfa_escaping_closure_cross/lib.Returned: missing cross-package local cast violation
